message:
skill-loop pass 6/10: simplify recipient reconstruct tests

Extracts a test-only recipients_json helper in reconstruct.rs and fixes the fresh-eyes recipient sync bug where existing blank agent names were treated as missing agents. Missing joined agent rows still emit [unknown-agent-N] sentinels. Verified with fmt, diff check, focused recipient tests, db check/clippy, and UBS.

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 # Total Passes: 10
 # Started: 2026-04-25T01:08:13Z
 
-## Status: IN PROGRESS - Pass 6 of 10
+## Status: IN PROGRESS - Pass 7 of 10
 
 ## Architecture Summary
 - Workspace is a Rust 2024 Cargo workspace with strict layering: `core` owns config/models/errors/metrics; `db` owns SQLite schema/query/cache/search persistence; `storage` owns Git archive and commit coalescing; `tools` owns the MCP tool implementations; `server` owns stdio/HTTP dispatch, TUI/web/ATC/runtime workers; `cli` owns `am`, robot mode, operator commands, gates, E2E, and benchmarks.
@@ -64,3 +64,12 @@
 - Verification: worker fresh-eyes inspection passed; `cargo fmt --check`; `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-core models::tests:: --locked`; `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets`; `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-core --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/models.rs` reported no critical findings.
 - Commit: `7b8f440a`.
 - Verdict: PRODUCTIVE.
+
+### Pass 6 - DB Query/Test Boilerplate - 2026-04-25T02:44:00Z
+- Files changed: `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/reconstruct.rs`.
+- Changes: added test-only `message_one_recipients_json` to remove duplicated `recipients_json` row extraction/parsing in the two reconstructed recipient JSON tests.
+- Fresh-eyes fix: corrected `sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json` so existing blank agent names are dropped by the normalizer while genuinely missing agent rows still emit `[unknown-agent-N]` sentinels.
+- Preservation notes: the helper keeps the exact old test query/row/column/JSON-parse shape; the SQL fix preserves orphan visibility and aligns blank existing-agent handling with the existing test and `normalized_archive_agent_name` contract.
+- Verification: worker fresh-eyes inspection completed; `cargo fmt --check`; `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-db sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json --locked`; `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-db --all-targets`; `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-db --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/reconstruct.rs` reported 0 critical findings.
+- Commit: pending.
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE.

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+# Pass 6 - DB Query/Test Boilerplate
+
+## Files Changed
+- `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/reconstruct.rs`
+
+## Simplification
+- Added a test-only `message_one_recipients_json` helper that preserves the exact
+  `SELECT recipients_json FROM messages WHERE id = 1` query, row `0` lookup,
+  `recipients_json` column extraction, and JSON parsing used by two recipient
+  reconstruction tests.
+- Replaced the two duplicated query/extract/parse blocks with calls to the
+  helper.
+
+## Fresh-Eyes Fix
+- The focused test lane exposed an adjacent existing bug: an existing agent row
+  whose name trimmed to empty was emitted as `[unknown-agent-N]`.
+- Adjusted `sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json` so only missing joined
+  agent rows get the unknown-agent sentinel. Existing blank names now flow
+  through as blank and are dropped by `normalized_archive_agent_name`, while
+  orphaned recipient rows remain visible.
+
+## Preservation Proof
+- No schema, archive, salvage map, canonical ID, or warning text behavior was
+  changed.
+- Missing-agent sentinel behavior is still pinned by
+  `sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json_keeps_orphaned_recipient_rows_visible`.
+- Blank existing-agent drop behavior is now pinned by
+  `sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json_trims_and_drops_blank_names`.
+
+## Verification
+- `cargo fmt --check`
+- `git diff --check`
+- `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-db sync_reconstructed_message_recipients_json --locked`
+- `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-db --all-targets`
+- `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-db --all-targets -- -D warnings`
+- `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/reconstruct.rs` (0 critical; warning inventory only)
